title: rubus ulmifolius subsp. sanctus
intro: Rubus ulmifolius subsp. sanctus, also known as the holy blackberry, is a subspecies of the blackberry plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus ulmifolius subsp. sanctus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
